name: Bruschetta W/Variations
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 400°F (200°C).
2. Spread a layer of olive oil on slices of bread.
3. Place the bread in the preheated oven and toast until golden brown, about 5-7 minutes.
4. Remove the bread from the oven and let it cool slightly.
5. In a small bowl, mix together diced tomatoes, minced garlic, chopped basil, salt, and pepper to taste.
6. Spoon the tomato mixture onto the toasted bread slices.
7. Serve immediately and enjoy your delicious Bruschetta!
